attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_CST_FRST_VER_INF.FORECAST_VERSION_ID, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_CST_FRST_VER_INF.VERSION_NUMBER, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_CST_FRST_VER_INF.VERSION_NAME, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_CST_FRST_VER_INF.PROJECT_ID, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_CST_FRST_VER_INF.BASELINED_BY_PERSON_ID, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_CST_FRST_VER_INF.BASELINED_DATE, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_CST_FRST_VER_INF.VERSION_STATUS, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_CST_FRST_VER_INF.CURRENT_FLAG, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_CST_FRST_VER_INF.COPIED_FROM_VERSION_ID, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_CST_FRST_VER_INF.MIG_TO_OOB_STATUS, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_CST_FRST_VER_INF.LAST_SUBMITTED_DATE, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_CST_FRST_VER_INF.LAST_UPDATED_BY, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_CST_FRST_VER_INF.OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_CST_FRST_VER_INF.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_CST_FRST_VER_INF.CREATED_BY, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_CST_FRST_VER_INF.CREATION_DATE, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_CST_FRST_VER_INF.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_CST_FRST_VER_INF.LAST_SUBMITTED_BY, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_CST_FRST_VER_INF.CHANGE_REASON, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_CST_FRST_VER_INF.COMMENTS, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_CST_FRST_VER_INF.TRAIL_FILE_NAME, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_CST_FRST_VER_INF.SOURCE_DML_TYPE, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_CST_FRST_VER_INF.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_CST_FRST_VER_INF.REFRESH_DATETIME 
FROM
 $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_CST_FRST_VER_INF STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_CST_FRST_VER_INF,
(
select FORECAST_VERSION_ID ,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_CST_FRST_VER_INF
minus
select FORECAST_VERSION_ID ,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$NRTACCUMDB.CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_CST_FRST_VER_INF
) ACM
where 
 ACM.FORECAST_VERSION_ID = STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_CST_FRST_VER_INF.FORECAST_VERSION_ID 
 and ACM.REFRESH_DATETIME=STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_CST_FRST_VER_INF.REFRESH_DATETIME

attributes.Source Filter:
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME >= TO_TIMESTAMP('$$LastExtractDate','MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS:FF') - INTERVAL '$$OVERLAP_SECONDS' SECOND AND
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME <= (SELECT MAX(SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME) FROM $$SRCDB.CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_CST_FRST_VR_INFO)
